title: Light Client Trust Model
description: Light clients reduce bandwidth and storage costs by delegating part of validation to full nodes and peers, which changes what they can verify for themselves. Understanding this trust model clarifies the tradeoffs between full nodes, legacy SPV, and compact-filter clients.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Operating Modes
resources.notes: Official overview of full nodes, SPV security assumptions, and the tradeoffs of thinner client modes.

resources.title: BIP 157: Client Side Block Filtering
resources.notes: Primary specification for the modern light-client filtering model and its verification guarantees.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for full-node verification, wallet sync tradeoffs, and lightweight-client architecture.
